description_long: This is a small, vintage-style biplane painted in a vivid green color, featuring two stacked wings with black and white cross insignias reminiscent of early 20th-century military aircraft. The fuselage is slender and streamlined, with a single open cockpit positioned near the front, just behind a large, white propeller. The tail section includes a horizontal stabilizer and a single vertical fin, both adorned with matching insignias. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tail skid, all fixed and non-retractable. The engine appears to be a single piston type, mounted at the nose and partially exposed. The overall design is lightweight, with visible struts and bracing wires supporting the wings and undercarriage.
description: A green, vintage-style biplane with stacked wings, open cockpit, and black-and-white cross insignias, featuring a front-mounted propeller and fixed landing gear.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the open cockpit, large white propeller, and main landing gear beneath the lower wing.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the tail section, twin horizontal stabilizers, and the cross insignias on the wings and tail.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the tail fin, horizontal stabilizers, and the stacked wing structure.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the propeller, cockpit, and the undercarriage with both main wheels visible.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two straight, high-mounted wings stacked vertically and supported by struts; no winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles visible.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit located just behind the propeller.
